type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Estimates of air releases are now based on information provided on mill certificates for the steel and welding products used at the facility as opposed to the Material Safety Data Sheet concentrations used in previous assessments.  These changes were made based on recommendations provided by the licensed toxics reduction planner retained to complete the TSRP for this substance.

Estimates of recycled quantities are now based on information provided on mill certificates for the steel and welding products used at the facility as opposed to the Material Safety Data Sheet concentrations used in previous assessments.  These changes were made based on recommendations provided by the licensed toxics reduction planner retained to complete the TSRP for this substance.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

Estimates of recycled quantities are now based on information provided on mill certificates for the steel and welding products used at the facility as opposed to the Material Safety Data Sheet concentrations used in previous assessments.  These changes were made based on recommendations provided by the licensed toxics reduction planner retained to complete the TSRP for this substance.
